title: Distant Friends
description: Player like mobs that look at you from a distance
body:
"Distant Friends" is a Minecraft mod that adds eerie player-like mobs to your game. These mobs stand still in the distance and punch the air / sneak as if they were real players. But as you approach them, they disappear without a trace.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
